gigapan.description:
Words and type
If you look at the shapes they result into letters, and words. It is hard for me to see the words, the divide in my brain between 'words' and 'shapes' is strong. So this piece becomes more provocotive, and more powerful, the longer I look at it.

See www.typopassage.at
